summary: The quote creation flow begins in the client-side AddQuote component, which triggers a POST request to the application's API route. The API handler then interacts with the database to persist the new quote, after which the client refreshes the UI to display the updated data.

nodes.title: AddQuote Component
nodes.explanation: A user clicks the 'Add new quote' button, initiating a POST request to the /api endpoint.

nodes.title: API Route Handler
nodes.explanation: The API route receives the POST request and executes the necessary backend logic to create a record.

nodes.title: Query Service
nodes.explanation: The query service interacts with the database client to insert the new quote data into the system.

nodes.title: Client Refresh
nodes.explanation: Upon receiving a success response, the component triggers a router refresh to fetch and display the updated quotes.
